scripts.dev:backend: docker compose up --build db kafka schema-registry kafka-init-topics auth-service driver-service route-service payment-service payout-service notification-service mail-service api-gateway
scripts.dev:backend:detach: docker compose up -d --build db kafka schema-registry kafka-init-topics auth-service driver-service route-service payment-service payout-service notification-service mail-service api-gateway
scripts.dev:all: docker compose up -d && turbo run dev
